channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Ex-Dead Kennedys Singer Jello Biafra Hospitalized After Stroke
item.description: Sending positive vibes and well wishes to punk legend Jello Biafra for a speedy recovery 🤘🏥 #GetWellSoonJello

item.title: BIG|BRAVE Announce New Album in grief or in hope: Hear “the ineptitude for mutual discernment”
item.description: 🔥 New music alert! BIG|BRAVE dropping their latest album - get ready to feel all the feels with "the ineptitude for mutual discernment" 🎶 #BIGBRAVE #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Make Do and Mend are back, album & shows announced
item.description: Guess who's making a comeback? 🌟 Make Do and Mend have new tunes and gigs on the horizon! 🎶💥 #MusicNews #RockRevival

item.title: Franz Ferdinand Announce North American Headlining Tour
item.description: 🎸 Let's dance the night away with Franz Ferdinand on their North American tour! 🎶 Who's joining the party? 🎉 #FranzFerdinand #TourNews

item.title: Jill Scott Announces 2026 Tour
item.description: 🎉 Let's groove into the future with Jill Scott's 2026 tour announcement! Who's ready to sing along? 🎶 #JillScott2026Tour
